use_cases: User profile navigation in SaaS dashboards with animated menu items
Sidebar menu for account settings and navigation in web applications
User profile sidebar with logout functionality for authenticated apps
Animated navigation component for admin panels and user dashboards
Profile menu with grouped navigation items using staggered spring animations
ai_summary: A user profile sidebar navigation component with a header displaying avatar, name, and email, followed by animated navigation menu items. Built with Framer Motion for staggered spring animations and supports grouping items with optional separators. Uses Lucide icons for visual indicators and includes a logout action at the bottom.
